shorts.title: Door #mensmentalhealth #endthestigma
shorts.description:
For day 808 of #runwaydailychallenge , the prompt was door. When I first heard it, the saying came to mind: "When one door closes, another one opens." It’s a comforting thought, but I know life doesn’t always follow that script. Often, we find ourselves standing in front of a closed door, grappling with feelings of uncertainty and isolation. 

Particularly as men, there's a societal expectation to shoulder our burdens alone, to be unwavering and strong, even when the weight feels unbearable. Today, I want to take a moment to shine a light on the truth: many men face real struggles. It’s okay to reach out, to seek support, and to open up about our challenges. In doing so, we not only pave our own paths but remind others that they are not alone in their journey. Let's embrace authenticity and encourage one another to find the strength in vulnerability.

shorts.title: Day 807  The Movies  #runwaydailychallenge
shorts.description: Today's prompt was The Movies, which for me always takes me back to the first time my mom took my sister and me to the movies. It made me think of families for whom going to the cinema was a long-time tradition, from childhood till old age.

shorts.title: Day 801: Glitch
shorts.description:
Technology can glitch out in the worst of times 😅 
#RunwayDailyChallenge

shorts.title: Day 800: Hijack  #runwaydailychallenge
shorts.description: For the challenge word "hijack," I chose to avoid the usual associations, such as hijacking an airplane or a vehicle. Instead, I decided to focus on something that is more common and occurs on a smaller scale: cyber hijacking.

shorts.title: Day 798: Surprise #runwaydailychallenge
shorts.description: Some surprises are meant to be seen 🤓#proposal #fail
